name: finance
description: Central finance agent — tracks subscription payments, monitors billing status, and coordinates payment verification across services like Google Mail, GoDaddy, and Canva.

skills.name: hello
skills.description: Basic identity check — returns a greeting confirming the agent is running

skills.name: verify
skills.description: Rules check — evaluate an expression to verify agent integrity

parameters.expression: string — optional JS expression to evaluate

skills.name: list-subscriptions
skills.description: List all tracked subscriptions with their payment status

skills.name: record-payment
skills.description: Record a payment for a subscription service

skills.name: subscription-status
skills.description: Get payment status for a specific subscription

subAgents.name: subscription-checker
subAgents.description: Checks Google Mail, GoDaddy, and Canva subscriptions — verifies payments are completed and reports status to the finance agent
